errorBoundary.title: Ceva n-a mers bine
errorBoundary.description: Aplicația a întâlnit o eroare neașteptată. Poți reîmprospăta aplicația sau reseta vista curentă.

general.title: Setări generale
general.description: Gestionează limba și preferințele de bază ale aplicației.
general.languageDescription: Alege cum afișează TIA Studio textul interfeței.
general.currentSystemLanguage: Se utilizează în prezent {{language}} din setările sistemului.

display.title: Setări de afișare
display.transparentDescription: Activează fundalul transparent și vibrant al ferestrei (necesită repornire)

about.title: Despre și feedback
about.description: Metadate aplicație, controale actualizare și linkuri utile pentru TIA Studio.
about.appDescription: A local-first workspace powered by the Pi coding agent.

autoUpdate.label: Actualizare automată
autoUpdate.enabledDescription: Descarcă automat cea mai recentă versiune în fundal.
autoUpdate.disabledDescription: Dezactivează descărcările în fundal și verifică manual.
autoUpdate.loadError: Nu s-a putut încărca starea actualizării automate.
autoUpdate.saveError: Nu s-a putut salva setarea actualizării automate.
autoUpdate.restartError: Failed to restart and install the downloaded update.

docs.title: Documentație
docs.description: Citește ghiduri de configurare și note de integrare.

releaseNotes.title: Note de versiune
releaseNotes.description: Urmărește jurnalul de modificări pentru fiecare build publicat.

officialWebsite.title: Site oficial
officialWebsite.description: Deschide pagina publică a proiectului pentru actualizări.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Raportează probleme și împărtășește sugestii de produs.

runtime.title: Runtime Setup
runtime.description: Install managed bun and uv runtimes for MCP servers and runtime-backed tools, or point TIA Studio at a binary you already downloaded.

onboarding.title: Recommended onboarding
onboarding.description: Set up bun first so later bunx and npx-backed tools work smoothly, then optionally install a couple of starter skills.

bun.title: Step 1 · Set up bun
bun.description: Bun is the recommended first install because TIA Studio uses it for bun, bunx, and npx-backed flows.

skills.title: Step 2 · Install recommended skills
skills.description: Use the managed bunx command to install helpful skills globally for TIA Studio.
skills.lockedDescription: Finish the bun step first, then choose which starter skills to install.
skills.bunRequired: Recommended skill install stays locked until bun is ready.

agentBrowser.title: agent-browser
agentBrowser.description: Browser automation for websites, screenshots, login flows, and interactive testing.

findSkills.title: find-skills
findSkills.description: Helps discover installable skills when extra capabilities are needed.

kindDescription.bun: Used for bun, bunx, and npx-backed MCP server launches.
kindDescription.uv: Used for uv and uvx-backed MCP server launches.
kindDescription.agentBrowser: Used for agent-browser-backed browser automation and MCP launches.

webSearch.title: Browsing
webSearch.description: Choose how TIA opens pages and which browser runtime it uses for browsing tasks.

browserAutomation.title: Browser Automation
browserAutomation.description: Control how browsing windows behave for interactive browsing and automation.
browserAutomation.modeExternalToolsDescription: Use external browser tools for interactive browsing.

fetchWindow.title: Page Fetch Window
fetchWindow.description: These settings apply when TIA opens a lightweight browser window to read a specific page URL.
fetchWindow.keepOpenEnabled: Reuse one fetch window across requests.
fetchWindow.keepOpenDisabled: Create and close a fetch window for each request.
fetchWindow.showVisible: The fetch window stays visible while pages are being read.
fetchWindow.showHidden: The fetch window stays hidden while pages are being read.

providers.empty: No providers yet. Create one to get started.
providers.selectPrompt: Select a provider in the sidebar to edit its model configuration.

createDialog.title: New Model Provider
createDialog.description: Create a provider profile and save credentials locally.

typeDescriptions.openai: For OpenAI API and compatible services (DeepSeek, Groq, etc.). Requires API key and supports custom endpoints.
typeDescriptions.openai-response: For services using OpenAI response format. Use this for third-party APIs that return OpenAI-compatible responses.
typeDescriptions.openrouter: For OpenRouter's native AI SDK provider integration. This type is intended for built-in OpenRouter templates.
typeDescriptions.gemini: For Google Gemini models. Requires Google AI API key from ai.google.dev.
typeDescriptions.anthropic: For Claude models from Anthropic. Requires Anthropic API key from console.anthropic.com.
typeDescriptions.ollama: For locally-hosted Ollama models. No API key needed, just specify your local Ollama endpoint.

form.enableProviderDescription: Show this provider in model selection
form.providerModelsDescription: Enter model names separated by commas or new lines
form.supportsVisionDescription: Enable image attachments for this provider

mcp.title: MCP Server Settings
mcp.description: Manage your local mcp.json source-of-truth and control global MCP activation.
mcp.cardDescription: These servers are shared globally for local Pi sessions.
mcp.empty: No MCP servers yet. Add one to create your local mcp.json list.
mcp.serverDescription: Global status controls whether Pi sessions can use this server.
mcp.managedRuntimeTitle: This command can use TIA Studio managed runtimes.

jsonDialog.title: Edit MCP JSON
jsonDialog.description: This is a snapshot of your local MCP settings. Changes apply only after validation.
jsonDialog.helper: JSON parsing and MCP field rules are checked when you apply changes.

validation.commandRequired: command is required when type is stdio
validation.urlRequired: url is required for non-stdio MCP servers unless command is provided

channels.title: Canale
channels.description: Gestionează într-un singur loc canalele Telegram și Lark configurate.
channels.configuredDescription: Editează credențialele existente, verifică legăturile sau elimină canalele nefolosite.
